2223710.name: Loaders
2223710.description:
Loaders is a free-to-play 10v10 tactical PvP shooter set on a war-torn Earth in the year 2525, where rival Houses wage endless proxy wars over Gold, a rare catalyst that powers the translocation technology civilization relies on to exist. You are a Loader, your consciousness uploaded into a heavily armed antigrav tank, deployed as expendable firepower in a planetary conflict fueled by galactic dependence.

Battles are tense, brutal, and unforgiving. Destructible environments, high-powered weapons, and no respawns make every decision count. Rocks won’t save you. Magnetic shields buy you seconds. To survive, you’ll need to think fast, move smart, and fight hard.

Customize your loadout. Unlock splitters, active and passive power modules. Reload. Drop back in. You are the rig.

FULLY DESTRUCTIBLE ENVIRONMENTS

Cover doesn’t last. Loaders features a battlefield that breaks as hard as you hit it, blow through rocks, shatter walls, reshape dunes, or widen chokepoints to change the flow of combat in real time. If it's in the war zone, you can destroy it. No path is safe. No defense is permanent. Use that.

TACTICAL 10v10 ARENA BATTLES

Two teams. One map. Zero forgiveness. Take part in 20-player matches where every player controls a fully loaded antigrav tank. Your goal: eliminate the enemy or destroy their pylon, the jamming system hiding them from orbital strikes. But keep yours alive, or you’ll get erased from above. Fight for ground. Control the zone. Shut them down.

BUILD YOUR LOADOUT, DEFINE YOUR ROLE

Your tank is yours to shape.

Choose from 5 distinct classes, each with unique movement, shield, and role types, and dive deeper with sub-classes for support, disruption, or firepower. Equip up to 4 active and 5 passive modules, plus a splitter system. Balance your energy budget. Fine-tune your build. No meta lasts forever.

SHIELDS: POSITION MATTERS

Your Loader’s shields are your first line of defense, any cracks in them are your greatest vulnerability. Shields cover key angles and regenerate over time. Your hull doesn’t. To survive, you’ll need to manage positioning, flank your enemies, and strike where it hurts. If you're just trading fire, you're already behind.

DELIBERATE, TACTICAL PACING

Forget twitch shooting. Loaders is all about momentum, not reflex. High time-to-kill, inertial movement, and no respawns mean every shot has weight. Choose your angle. Time your approach. Make decisions before you engage, not after. Fire when you’re ready, and make it count.

A BRUTAL FUTURE BUILT ON SYNAPSE AND STEEL

The year is 2525. Crippled by the Red Plague, humanity has been brought to its knees. From orbit, powerful Houses wage proxy wars, not for glory, but for Gold. This rare element isn’t fuel. It’s the catalyst behind translocation, the only technology that lets humanity bypass light-speed and stay connected across the stars. Every jump burns it. No Gold, no travel. No Houses, no civilization.

You are a Loader: a human consciousness uploaded into an antigrav tank, engineered to be destroyed, recompiled, and sent back into the fight, wherever Gold is found, conflict follows.

No legends. Just contracts, steel, and survival.

Drop in. Upload. You are the rig.
2223710.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
